languages.text: "Выскажитесь и те, кто оставался в стороне. Говорите свободно, советники, не опасайтесь того, что ваши слова будут истолкованы превратно. Я желаю услышать всех".
languages.translation_comment:
Не играет DL_JuvennaArrestedOrDead
Если играют DL_MerovianKilled или DL_Exalt117ArrestedOrDead, то DL_Treason_counter + 1 за каждого

traits.locale_text: "Хорошо, пусть скажут свое слово и те, кто остался в стороне. Говорите свободно, советники, не опасайтесь того, что ваши слова будут истолкованы превратно, ибо я желаю слышать всех".

languages.translation_comment:
Не играет DL_JuvennaArrestedOrDead
Если играют DL_MerovianKilled или DL_Exalt117ArrestedOrDead, то DL_Treason_counter + 1 за каждого

languages.text: "I also wish to hear from those who have held their peace thus far. Speak freely, counsellors, do not fear that your words will be misinterpreted. I wish to hear from everyone."
languages.original_text: "Выскажитесь и те, кто оставался в стороне. Говорите свободно, советники, не опасайтесь того, что ваши слова будут истолкованы превратно. Я желаю услышать всех".

traits.locale_text: "I also wish to hear from those who have held their peace thus far. Speak freely, counsellors, do not fear that your words will be misinterpreted. I wish to hear from everyone."
"I also wish to hear from those who have held their peace thus far. Speak freely, counsellors, do not fear that your words will be misinterpreted. I wish to hear from everyone."
"I also wish to hear from those who have held their peace thus far. Speak freely, counsellors, do not fear that your words will be misinterpreted. I wish to hear from everyone."

languages.text: “那些一直缄默的人，我也想听听他们的意见。诸位顾问，请畅所欲言，不必担心被误解。我想听听在座每一位的意见。”
languages.original_text: "I also wish to hear from those who have held their peace thus far. Speak freely, counsellors, do not fear that your words will be misinterpreted. I wish to hear from everyone."

traits.locale_text: “那些一直缄默的人，我也想听听他们的意见。诸位顾问，请畅所欲言，不必担心被误解。我想听听在座每一位的意见。”

languages.text: « J'aimerais aussi prendre le temps d'écouter ceux et celles qui se sont tus jusqu'à présent. Exprimez-vous librement, conseillers et conseillères ; ne craignez pas que vos paroles soient mal interprétées. Je suis ouvert à toutes les propositions. »
languages.original_text: "I also wish to hear from those who have held their peace thus far. Speak freely, counsellors, do not fear that your words will be misinterpreted. I wish to hear from everyone."

traits.locale_text: « J'aimerais aussi prendre le temps d'écouter ceux et celles qui se sont tus jusqu'à présent. Exprimez-vous librement, conseillers et conseillères ; ne craignez pas que vos paroles soient mal interprétées. Je suis ouvert à toutes les propositions. »

languages.text: «También quiero escuchar a quienes han guardado silencio hasta ahora. Hablen con libertad, asesores. No teman que malinterprete sus palabras, quiero escucharlos a todos».
languages.original_text: "I also wish to hear from those who have held their peace thus far. Speak freely, counsellors, do not fear that your words will be misinterpreted. I wish to hear from everyone."

traits.locale_text: «También quiero escuchar a quienes han guardado silencio hasta ahora. Hablen con libertad, asesores. No teman que malinterprete sus palabras, quiero escucharlos a todos».

languages.text: "Ayrıca şimdiye kadar sessiz kalanları da duymak istiyorum. Özgürce konuşun danışmanlar, sözlerinizin yanlış yorumlanacağından korkmayın. Herkesi duymak istiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I also wish to hear from those who have held their peace thus far. Speak freely, counsellors, do not fear that your words will be misinterpreted. I wish to hear from everyone."

traits.locale_text: "Ayrıca şimdiye kadar sessiz kalanları da duymak istiyorum. Özgürce konuşun danışmanlar, sözlerinizin yanlış yorumlanacağından korkmayın. Herkesi duymak istiyorum."

languages.text: "Ich möchte auch die Meinung derer hören, die sich bis jetzt in Schweigen gehüllt haben. Sprecht frei heraus, Ratgeber. Habt keine Angst, dass Eure Worte falsch verstanden werden. Alle sollen sagen, was sie denken."
languages.original_text: "I also wish to hear from those who have held their peace thus far. Speak freely, counsellors, do not fear that your words will be misinterpreted. I wish to hear from everyone."

traits.locale_text: "Ich möchte auch die Meinung derer hören, die sich bis jetzt in Schweigen gehüllt haben. Sprecht frei heraus, Ratgeber. Habt keine Angst, dass Eure Worte falsch verstanden werden. Alle sollen sagen, was sie denken."

languages.text: 「これまで黙ってきた人も、意見を述べてほしい。自由に話してくれ、助言者たちよ。君の言葉が誤解されるのではないかと恐れることはない。全員の意見を聞きたい。」
languages.original_text: "I also wish to hear from those who have held their peace thus far. Speak freely, counsellors, do not fear that your words will be misinterpreted. I wish to hear from everyone."

traits.locale_text: 「これまで黙ってきた人も、意見を述べてほしい。自由に話してくれ、助言者たちよ。君の言葉が誤解されるのではないかと恐れることはない。全員の意見を聞きたい。」
